duckdb:position-deletes:v2.notes: DuckDB reads V2 tables with position deletes and writes positional deletes for UPDATE/DELETE

duckdb:position-deletes:v3.notes: V3 tables with position deletes can be read if only V2-compatible data types are used
caveats: V3 reads supported only with V2-compatible data types

duckdb:equality-deletes:v2.notes: DuckDB supports reading tables with equality deletes

duckdb:equality-deletes:v3.notes: DuckDB Iceberg extension does not yet support V3
caveats: V3 support not yet available

duckdb:merge-on-read:v2.notes: DuckDB supports merge-on-read semantics for both reads and writes; UPDATE/DELETE use positional deletes
caveats: Only merge-on-read semantics for writes (copy-on-write not supported for UPDATE/DELETE)
UPDATE/DELETE limited to non-partitioned and non-sorted tables

duckdb:merge-on-read:v3.notes: V3 tables use merge-on-read with binary deletion vectors; UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE against a V3 table write deletion vectors automatically

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 deletion vectors)

duckdb:copy-on-write:v2.notes: DuckDB can read copy-on-write Iceberg tables; INSERT uses COW semantics, but UPDATE/DELETE use merge-on-read only
caveats: Copy-on-write mode not supported for UPDATE/DELETE (only merge-on-read)
INSERT effectively uses COW (append-only, no delete files)

duckdb:copy-on-write:v3.notes: Copy-on-write behavior on V3 tables not yet documented
caveats: V3 copy-on-write support not yet documented

duckdb:schema-evolution:v2.notes: DuckDB reads schema-evolved Iceberg tables; ALTER TABLE support added in the Iceberg extension shipped with v1.5.2

duckdb:schema-evolution:v3.notes: ALTER TABLE (rename table/column, add/drop column, set format-version) is fully supported on V3 tables since v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (ALTER TABLE + V3)

duckdb:column-default-values:v2.notes: Column default values are a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

duckdb:column-default-values:v3.notes: Schema-level column default values supported on V3 tables since the extension shipped with v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:nanosecond-timestamps:v2.notes: Nanosecond timestamps are a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

duckdb:nanosecond-timestamps:v3.notes: TIMESTAMP_NS (nanosecond-precision timestamps) supported for reads and writes on V3 tables since the extension shipped with v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:hidden-partitioning:v2.notes: DuckDB reads hidden-partitioned Iceberg tables; truncate and bucket partition transforms for writes added in v1.5.2

links.label: Announcing DuckDB v1.5.2 (truncate and bucket partitions)

duckdb:hidden-partitioning:v3.notes: Reads and writes of hidden-partitioned V3 tables are supported, including the bucket and truncate transforms added in v1.5.2/v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (partition transforms + V3)

duckdb:partition-evolution:v2.notes: DuckDB supports reading partition-evolved Iceberg tables

duckdb:partition-evolution:v3.notes: Partition evolution on V3 tables readable if V2-compatible data types are used
caveats: V3 reads supported only with V2-compatible data types

duckdb:multi-arg-transforms:v2.notes: Multi-argument transforms are a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

duckdb:multi-arg-transforms:v3.notes: Multi-argument transform support on V3 tables not yet documented
caveats: V3-only feature; DuckDB support not yet documented

duckdb:time-travel:v2.notes: DuckDB supports time travel via AT (VERSION => snapshot_id) and AT (TIMESTAMP => ts) syntax

duckdb:time-travel:v3.notes: Time travel via AT (VERSION => snapshot_id) and AT (TIMESTAMP => ts) works on V3 tables since full V3 support in v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:table-maintenance:v2.notes: DuckDB does not provide Iceberg table maintenance operations (compaction, expire snapshots, etc.)

duckdb:table-maintenance:v3.notes: DuckDB does not provide Iceberg table maintenance operations

duckdb:branching-tagging:v2.notes: DuckDB does not support Iceberg branching and tagging

duckdb:branching-tagging:v3.notes: DuckDB does not support Iceberg branching and tagging

duckdb:read-support:v2.notes: Full read support for Iceberg V1 and V2 tables via the iceberg extension
caveats: Requires the iceberg extension (auto-installed on first use)

duckdb:read-support:v3.notes: Since v1.5.3 DuckDB fully reads V3 tables, including VARIANT, TIMESTAMP_NS, column default values, binary deletion vectors, and row lineage
caveats: Geography type and Unknown type are not yet supported (planned for DuckDB v2.0.0)

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:write-insert:v2.notes: INSERT INTO supported since DuckDB v1.4.0 via REST catalog attachment
caveats: Requires attachment to an Iceberg REST catalog

duckdb:write-insert:v3.notes: Since v1.5.3 DuckDB creates and inserts into V3 tables (CREATE TABLE ... WITH ('format-version' = 3)), including VARIANT and TIMESTAMP_NS columns
caveats: Requires attachment to an Iceberg REST catalog

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:write-merge-update-delete:v2.notes: MERGE INTO, UPDATE, and DELETE are all supported. UPDATE/DELETE landed in v1.4.2, partitioned UPDATE/DELETE and ALTER TABLE in v1.5.2, and MERGE INTO in v1.5.3.
caveats: Uses merge-on-read semantics only (writes positional deletes); copy-on-write for deletes is not supported
Requires attachment to an Iceberg REST catalog

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (MERGE INTO)
Announcing DuckDB v1.5.2 (partitioned UPDATE/DELETE, ALTER TABLE)

duckdb:write-merge-update-delete:v3.notes: Since v1.5.3 MERGE INTO, UPDATE, and DELETE are supported on V3 tables; row-level changes are written as binary deletion vectors (Puffin) under merge-on-read semantics
caveats: Uses merge-on-read semantics (deletion vectors); copy-on-write for deletes is not supported
Requires attachment to an Iceberg REST catalog

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (MERGE INTO + V3)

duckdb:catalog-integration:v2.notes: DuckDB supports attaching to Iceberg REST Catalogs, AWS Glue, and S3 Tables
caveats: Only REST-based catalogs supported (no Hive Metastore, Hadoop, or JDBC)

duckdb:catalog-integration:v3.notes: Since v1.5.3 REST catalog integration fully supports V3 tables for reads and writes
caveats: Only REST-based catalogs supported (no Hive Metastore, Hadoop, or JDBC)

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:hive-metastore:v2.notes: DuckDB does not support Hive Metastore; only REST-based catalogs are supported

duckdb:hive-metastore:v3.notes: DuckDB does not support Hive Metastore

duckdb:aws-glue-catalog:v2.notes: DuckDB supports AWS Glue via dedicated ENDPOINT_TYPE 'glue' or SigV4 authorization
caveats: Experimental; uses SageMaker Lakehouse (AWS Glue) Iceberg REST endpoint

duckdb:aws-glue-catalog:v3.notes: AWS Glue (SageMaker Lakehouse) integration supports V3 tables since full V3 support in v1.5.3
caveats: Experimental

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:rest-catalog:v2.notes: Full Iceberg REST Catalog support with OAuth2 authentication since v1.3+

duckdb:rest-catalog:v3.notes: REST Catalog attachment fully supports V3 tables for reads and writes since v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:nessie:v2.notes: DuckDB does not natively support Nessie catalog; no documented REST compatibility

duckdb:nessie:v3.notes: DuckDB does not support Nessie catalog

duckdb:polaris:v2.notes: DuckDB supports Polaris via REST Catalog with explicit documentation and examples

duckdb:polaris:v3.notes: Polaris via REST Catalog fully supports V3 tables for reads and writes since v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:unity-catalog:v2.notes: DuckDB may connect to Unity Catalog via REST Catalog API but this is not officially documented
caveats: Not officially documented; requires REST Catalog endpoint configuration

duckdb:unity-catalog:v3.notes: Unity Catalog via REST for V3 tables not documented
caveats: Not officially documented

duckdb:hadoop-catalog:v2.notes: DuckDB does not support Hadoop catalog; only REST-based catalogs are supported

duckdb:hadoop-catalog:v3.notes: DuckDB does not support Hadoop catalog

duckdb:jdbc-catalog:v2.notes: DuckDB does not support JDBC catalog; only REST-based catalogs are supported

duckdb:jdbc-catalog:v3.notes: DuckDB does not support JDBC catalog

duckdb:table-creation:v2.notes: DuckDB supports CREATE TABLE and DROP TABLE via SQL DDL since v1.4.0
caveats: Requires attachment to an Iceberg REST catalog

duckdb:table-creation:v3.notes: Since v1.5.3 DuckDB creates V3 tables via CREATE TABLE ... WITH ('format-version' = 3), or upgrades an existing table with ALTER TABLE ... SET ('format-version' = 3)
caveats: Requires attachment to an Iceberg REST catalog

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:variant-type:v2.notes: Variant type is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

duckdb:variant-type:v3.notes: VARIANT type is fully supported for both reads and writes on V3 tables since the DuckDB-Iceberg extension shipped with v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:shredded-variant:v2.notes: Shredded variant is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

duckdb:shredded-variant:v3.notes: Shredded variant is a V3-only feature not supported by DuckDB's Iceberg extension
caveats: V3-only feature; DuckDB V3 support limited to V2-compatible data types

duckdb:geometry-type:v2.notes: Geometry type is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

duckdb:geometry-type:v3.notes: The GEOMETRY type is supported by the DuckDB Iceberg extension (added in v1.5.2). The Iceberg V3 GEOGRAPHY type is not yet supported (planned for DuckDB v2.0.0).
caveats: GEOGRAPHY type not yet supported (planned for DuckDB v2.0.0)

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (Geography/Unknown not yet supported)

duckdb:lineage:v2.notes: Lineage is a V3 feature; not applicable to V2

duckdb:lineage:v3.notes: Row lineage tracking is written for V3 tables by the DuckDB-Iceberg extension since v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:statistics:v2.notes: DuckDB reads column statistics from Iceberg manifest files for scan planning and file pruning. When writing to Iceberg tables (v1.4.0+), DuckDB writes column statistics to manifest files via the standard Iceberg write path.
caveats: Requires the iceberg extension

duckdb:statistics:v3.notes: DuckDB reads and writes column statistics to manifest files on V3 tables since full V3 support in v1.5.3

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 support)

duckdb:bloom-filters:v2.notes: DuckDB does not support reading or writing Iceberg Parquet-level bloom filters or Puffin-based bloom filter statistics.

duckdb:bloom-filters:v3.notes: DuckDB does not support Iceberg bloom filters on any format version

duckdb:type-promotion:v2.notes: DuckDB's Iceberg extension supports read and basic write operations (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE) but does not support ALTER TABLE column type changes for Iceberg tables. Type promotions must be performed using Spark or another DDL-capable engine.
caveats: DuckDB can read Iceberg tables that have been type-promoted by other engines
ALTER TABLE column type changes are not supported for Iceberg tables in DuckDB

duckdb:type-promotion:v3.notes: DuckDB does not support ALTER TABLE column type changes for Iceberg V3 tables.
caveats: ALTER TABLE type changes not supported for Iceberg tables in DuckDB

duckdb:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v2.notes: DuckDB Iceberg extension supports REST catalog for reads and writes. Configure with ATTACH using the Horizon Catalog REST endpoint.

duckdb:snowflake-horizon-catalog:v3.notes: DuckDB V3 Iceberg table support is partial; REST catalog connectivity to Horizon Catalog is not yet explicitly documented for V3.
caveats: V3 catalog support via DuckDB not yet documented

duckdb:deletion-vectors:v2.notes: Deletion vectors are a V3 feature; not applicable to Iceberg V2

duckdb:deletion-vectors:v3.notes: Since v1.5.3 DuckDB reads and writes binary deletion vectors (Puffin) on V3 tables. UPDATE/DELETE/MERGE against a V3 table automatically encode changes as deletion vectors rather than positional-delete Parquet files.

links.label: New DuckDB-Iceberg Features in v1.5.3 (V3 deletion vectors)
